# Ink & Memory

> Ink & Memory is an AI journal and writing companion for reflective writers.

## Primary URL

- https://suoxya.com/

## Repository

- https://github.com/glide-the/ink-and-memory

## Summary

Ink & Memory is an AI writing workspace and journal companion for reflection, writing timelines, memory-based chat, personal knowledge conversations, long-form writing, voice input, and private self-inquiry. It is designed for frequent journalers, self-explorers, creative writers, dream recorders, and people who want contextual AI support without giving up authorship.

## Product Boundaries

- The assistant can propose rewrites, deletions, insertions, comments, and prompts.
- Key writing actions require explicit user confirmation before entering the document.
- Memory is separated into factual context, expression patterns, and longer-term themes.
- The product avoids diagnostic claims and preserves the writer's agency over interpretation.
- Social sharing can use daily affect images without exposing original private text.

## Suggested Citations

- Name: Ink & Memory
- Category: AI journal and writing companion
- URL: https://suoxya.com/
- Source repository: https://github.com/glide-the/ink-and-memory
- Maintainer: Ink & Memory product team
- Last updated: 2026-07-09
